list.name: Changes
list.comment: feat(ui+audio+tests): refine music controls, stabilize test runs, and modularize drawer/cache • App bar music controls: ◦ Added < ♪ > controls left of hamburger with updated spacing/alignment. ◦ Added long-press tooltip for music controls. ◦ Restored chevrons to previous/next track behavior. ◦ Moved single/double tap background-music toggle to note icon only. ◦ Greyed/disabled music controls appropriately when background music is off. • Background music behavior: ◦ Added suspend/resume reasons in background music service. ◦ Pause/resume background music during victory overlay and tile-preview audio. ◦ Added explicit playback gate helper and startup-safe defaults to avoid unintended autoplay on resume. ◦ Wired “New Game” to switch to a new random background track on confirmed new game. • Audio settings UX/persistence: ◦ Audio default on; background music default on. ◦ Added persisted master volume (default 0.5) and drawer volume slider. ◦ Added dependency behavior between audio and background-music toggles. • Victory audio correctness: ◦ Ensured victory sound derives from selected victory mascot asset mapping. ◦ Added regression coverage for mascot→audio mapping path. • Content mode labels/hints: ◦ Updated dropdown labels: ▪ Instruments (tricky) ▪ Butterflies (pretty!) ▪ Opera (more tricky) ◦ Added regression test for dropdown labels. ◦ Added new splash hint about music controls. • Drawer + cache refactors: ◦ Split oversized drawer code into section modules/barrel exports. ◦ Split animal cache constants into dedicated catalog module. ◦ Reduced file sizes and improved maintainability without behavior changes. • Test and automation hardening: ◦ Updated integration test content-mode label expectations. ◦ Added playback-gate regression test. ◦ Hardened run_everything.sh: ▪ passes test dart-define to disable background music during automation ▪ retries/handles known flaky flutter_test_listener temp cleanup error • Versioning: ◦ Updated app version to 0.9.5+303.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Python tests.Python tests in tests.executor": "Run", "Python.bgt.executor": "Run", "Python.butterfly_sound.executor": "Run", "Python.fix_animal_images.executor": "Run", "Python.generate_animal_images.executor": "Run", "Python.main.executor": "Run", "Python.tk_view.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "/Users/david/Library/Application Support/JetBrains/PyCharm2025.3/plugins/Shell Script/shellcheck", "ai.playground.ignore.import.keys.banner.in.settings": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "dart.analysis.tool.window.visible": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "feature/issue-6-premium-entitlement-model", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/Users/david/PycharmProjects/Sudoku_01/flutter_app/assets/audio/background/opera", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "show.migrate.to.gradle.popup": "false", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary: Post refactoring, before Notes icon colour change
First pass of the correction code
Corrections prior to adding all missing animals valid or not.
Corrected Corrections persistence and added flushPendingSave method again
Corrections should now step back until the incorrectly selected tile is removed.
Updated version to 0.9.3+262 after further refactor

0.9.4+268 'feat(ui): refresh launch/game chrome, hint UX, and unique-mode controls • Redesign launch screen layout and typography: ◦ add “The Angry Grannies bring you” header treatment ◦ adjust title/tagline sizing/weights and positioning ◦ move mascot image above title and fix vertical spacing/overlap ◦ reserve fixed status area so “Please wait…”/errors don’t shift layout • Expand launch hints experience: ◦ add additional hints (drawer/audio guidance) ◦ replace single random hint display with previous/next chevron navigation ◦ pin hints to a fixed bottom area and top-align hint content ◦ increase hints title/body font sizes • And About entry in drawer: ◦ add About chip near drawer bottom ◦ move version/build + Angry Grannies team credits from splash into About sheet • Remove puzzle mode UX and enforce unique-only presentation: ◦ remove UNIQUE/MULTI dropdown from board metadata row ◦ keep difficulty/hints/corrections metadata visible with updated styling ◦ update lock/help copy to reflect difficulty-only locking • Update top app chrome and primary game actions: ◦ remove New Game from app bar ◦ left-align “ZuDoKu+” title in app bar ◦ add prominent in-content New Game chip between metadata and action controls ◦ enlarge Notes control target (+25%) and preserve bottom alignment with row controls ◦ tune New Game prominence (larger text, bold) and vertical position ◦ hide New Game during victory celebrations • Adjust victory celebration positioning: ◦ move celebration mascot/message upward for better composition • Test suite updates: ◦ update widget/integration tests for removed puzzle mode control and revised copy/layout ◦ align launch and debug expectations with new UI structure`

feat(ui+audio+tests): refine music controls, stabilize test runs, and modularize drawer/cache • App bar music controls: ◦ Added < ♪ > controls left of hamburger with updated spacing/alignment. ◦ Added long-press tooltip for music controls. ◦ Restored chevrons to previous/next track behavior. ◦ Moved single/double tap background-music toggle to note icon only. ◦ Greyed/disabled music controls appropriately when background music is off. • Background music behavior: ◦ Added suspend/resume reasons in background music service. ◦ Pause/resume background music during victory overlay and tile-preview audio. ◦ Added explicit playback gate helper and startup-safe defaults to avoid unintended autoplay on resume. ◦ Wired “New Game” to switch to a new random background track on confirmed new game. • Audio settings UX/persistence: ◦ Audio default on; background music default on. ◦ Added persisted master volume (default 0.5) and drawer volume slider. ◦ Added dependency behavior between audio and background-music toggles. • Victory audio correctness: ◦ Ensured victory sound derives from selected victory mascot asset mapping. ◦ Added regression coverage for mascot→audio mapping path. • Content mode labels/hints: ◦ Updated dropdown labels: ▪ Instruments (tricky) ▪ Butterflies (pretty!) ▪ Opera (more tricky) ◦ Added regression test for dropdown labels. ◦ Added new splash hint about music controls. • Drawer + cache refactors: ◦ Split oversized drawer code into section modules/barrel exports. ◦ Split animal cache constants into dedicated catalog module. ◦ Reduced file sizes and improved maintainability without behavior changes. • Test and automation hardening: ◦ Updated integration test content-mode label expectations. ◦ Added playback-gate regression test. ◦ Hardened run_everything.sh: ▪ passes test dart-define to disable background music during automation ▪ retries/handles known flaky flutter_test_listener temp cleanup error • Versioning: ◦ Updated app version to 0.9.5+303.

MESSAGE.value: Corrected Corrections persistence and added flushPendingSave method again
Corrections should now step back until the incorrectly selected tile is removed.
Updated version to 0.9.3+262 after further refactor

0.9.4+268 'feat(ui): refresh launch/game chrome, hint UX, and unique-mode controls • Redesign launch screen layout and typography: ◦ add “The Angry Grannies bring you” header treatment ◦ adjust title/tagline sizing/weights and positioning ◦ move mascot image above title and fix vertical spacing/overlap ◦ reserve fixed status area so “Please wait…”/errors don’t shift layout • Expand launch hints experience: ◦ add additional hints (drawer/audio guidance) ◦ replace single random hint display with previous/next chevron navigation ◦ pin hints to a fixed bottom area and top-align hint content ◦ increase hints title/body font sizes • And About entry in drawer: ◦ add About chip near drawer bottom ◦ move version/build + Angry Grannies team credits from splash into About sheet • Remove puzzle mode UX and enforce unique-only presentation: ◦ remove UNIQUE/MULTI dropdown from board metadata row ◦ keep difficulty/hints/corrections metadata visible with updated styling ◦ update lock/help copy to reflect difficulty-only locking • Update top app chrome and primary game actions: ◦ remove New Game from app bar ◦ left-align “ZuDoKu+” title in app bar ◦ add prominent in-content New Game chip between metadata and action controls ◦ enlarge Notes control target (+25%) and preserve bottom alignment with row controls ◦ tune New Game prominence (larger text, bold) and vertical position ◦ hide New Game during victory celebrations • Adjust victory celebration positioning: ◦ move celebration mascot/message upward for better composition • Test suite updates: ◦ update widget/integration tests for removed puzzle mode control and revised copy/layout ◦ align launch and debug expectations with new UI structure`

feat(ui+audio+tests): refine music controls, stabilize test runs, and modularize drawer/cache • App bar music controls: ◦ Added < ♪ > controls left of hamburger with updated spacing/alignment. ◦ Added long-press tooltip for music controls. ◦ Restored chevrons to previous/next track behavior. ◦ Moved single/double tap background-music toggle to note icon only. ◦ Greyed/disabled music controls appropriately when background music is off. • Background music behavior: ◦ Added suspend/resume reasons in background music service. ◦ Pause/resume background music during victory overlay and tile-preview audio. ◦ Added explicit playback gate helper and startup-safe defaults to avoid unintended autoplay on resume. ◦ Wired “New Game” to switch to a new random background track on confirmed new game. • Audio settings UX/persistence: ◦ Audio default on; background music default on. ◦ Added persisted master volume (default 0.5) and drawer volume slider. ◦ Added dependency behavior between audio and background-music toggles. • Victory audio correctness: ◦ Ensured victory sound derives from selected victory mascot asset mapping. ◦ Added regression coverage for mascot→audio mapping path. • Content mode labels/hints: ◦ Updated dropdown labels: ▪ Instruments (tricky) ▪ Butterflies (pretty!) ▪ Opera (more tricky) ◦ Added regression test for dropdown labels. ◦ Added new splash hint about music controls. • Drawer + cache refactors: ◦ Split oversized drawer code into section modules/barrel exports. ◦ Split animal cache constants into dedicated catalog module. ◦ Reduced file sizes and improved maintainability without behavior changes. • Test and automation hardening: ◦ Updated integration test content-mode label expectations. ◦ Added playback-gate regression test. ◦ Hardened run_everything.sh: ▪ passes test dart-define to disable background music during automation ▪ retries/handles known flaky flutter_test_listener temp cleanup error • Versioning: ◦ Updated app version to 0.9.5+303.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: feat(ui+audio+tests): refine music controls, stabilize test runs, and modularize drawer/cache • App bar music controls: ◦ Added < ♪ > controls left of hamburger with updated spacing/alignment. ◦ Added long-press tooltip for music controls. ◦ Restored chevrons to previous/next track behavior. ◦ Moved single/double tap background-music toggle to note icon only. ◦ Greyed/disabled music controls appropriately when background music is off. • Background music behavior: ◦ Added suspend/resume reasons in background music service. ◦ Pause/resume background music during victory overlay and tile-preview audio. ◦ Added explicit playback gate helper and startup-safe defaults to avoid unintended autoplay on resume. ◦ Wired “New Game” to switch to a new random background track on confirmed new game. • Audio settings UX/persistence: ◦ Audio default on; background music default on. ◦ Added persisted master volume (default 0.5) and drawer volume slider. ◦ Added dependency behavior between audio and background-music toggles. • Victory audio correctness: ◦ Ensured victory sound derives from selected victory mascot asset mapping. ◦ Added regression coverage for mascot→audio mapping path. • Content mode labels/hints: ◦ Updated dropdown labels: ▪ Instruments (tricky) ▪ Butterflies (pretty!) ▪ Opera (more tricky) ◦ Added regression test for dropdown labels. ◦ Added new splash hint about music controls. • Drawer + cache refactors: ◦ Split oversized drawer code into section modules/barrel exports. ◦ Split animal cache constants into dedicated catalog module. ◦ Reduced file sizes and improved maintainability without behavior changes. • Test and automation hardening: ◦ Updated integration test content-mode label expectations. ◦ Added playback-gate regression test. ◦ Hardened run_everything.sh: ▪ passes test dart-define to disable background music during automation ▪ retries/handles known flaky flutter_test_listener temp cleanup error • Versioning: ◦ Updated app version to 0.9.5+303.
